title: frankenia salina
intro: Frankenia salina, also known as ash plant or saltbush, is a succulent shrub native to coastal regions of the Mediterranean, Australia, and South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Frankenia salina include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Frankenia salina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
